FORMAL.en: [Formal register: use polite forms, avoid contractions, use full sentences]
FORMAL.es: [Registro formal: use usted, evite contracciones, oraciones completas]
FORMAL.fr: [Registre soutenu: utilisez vous, évitez les contractions, phrases complètes]
FORMAL.de: [Formelles Register: verwenden Sie Sie, keine Kontraktionen, vollständige Sätze]
FORMAL.pt: [Registro formal: use você, evite contrações, frases completas]
FORMAL.it: [Registro formale: usi Lei, eviti contrazioni, frasi complete]
FORMAL.ja: [敬体: ですます調を使用し、丁寧な表現]
FORMAL.zh: [正式语体: 使用礼貌用语，完整句子]
FORMAL.ar: [السجل الرسمي: استخدم صيغ المهذبة والجمل الكاملة]
FORMAL.tr: [Resmi kayıt: nazlı ifadeler kullanın, tam cümleler]
FORMAL.th: [ทางการ: ใช้คำสุภาพ ประโยคสมบูรณ์]
FORMAL.vi: [Trang trọng: dùng kính ngữ, câu đầy đủ]

CASUAL.en: [Casual register: use everyday language, contractions OK, conversational]
CASUAL.pt: [Registro casual: linguagem do dia a dia, tratamento informal]
CASUAL.it: [Registro informale: dai del tu, linguaggio quotidiano]
CASUAL.ja: [カジュアル: 日常的な表現、くだけた言い方]
CASUAL.zh: [非正式语体: 日常用语，随意表达]
CASUAL.th: [ไม่เป็นทางการ: ภาษาพูดในชีวิตประจำวัน]
